hero.label: Intelligent rehabilitation system
hero.title: Recovery support with exercise correctness monitoring
hero.description: RehabAI is a web application for people who are undergoing rehabilitation after injuries or surgeries. The system helps users perform exercises at home and in the future will provide real-time feedback using camera-based motion analysis.
hero.infoTitle: What problem does the app solve?
hero.infoText1: Many patients do exercises at home without constant supervision from a specialist. This can lead to incorrect movements, excessive strain, and slower recovery.
hero.infoText2: Our application is designed to make home rehabilitation more understandable, controlled, and safer.

features.title: Main features
features.card1Text: The user will be able to choose the part of the body that needs rehabilitation and receive a suitable set of exercises.
features.card2Text: The system will store training information and help the user maintain a regular exercise schedule.
features.card3Text: In the future, the application will use artificial intelligence to analyze exercise correctness in real time.
features.card4Text: The user will be able to receive notifications about mistakes in movements and recommendations for improving technique.
features.card5Text: Exercise results can be stored in the database for further review and analysis.
features.card6Text: The system will be available through a browser, so the user will be able to work with the application without installing a separate program.

howItWorks.title: How the application works
howItWorks.step1Text: The user creates an account or logs into the system to access the personal functionality of the application.
howItWorks.step2Text: After logging in, the user will be able to choose the part of the body that needs rehabilitation: arm, leg, back, neck, and other areas.
howItWorks.step3Text: The system will offer exercises and recommendations on training frequency, and in the future it will analyze movements through the camera.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to your account to continue.
auth.registerSubtitle: Create an account to use the system.
auth.name: Name

dashboard.label: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Choose the part of the body for which you want to view rehabilitation exercises. In the next stages, there will be a list of exercises, recommendations, and AI-based movement analysis here.
dashboard.selectedNote: Here we will later implement an exercise list, training schedule, progress saving, and exercise correctness checking through the camera.

arm.title: Arm
arm.description: Exercises for restoring mobility of the shoulder, elbow, wrist, and hand.

leg.title: Leg
leg.description: Exercises for restoring the knee, foot, lower leg, and overall movement stability.

back.title: Back
back.description: Exercises for improving posture, reducing tension, and strengthening the back muscles.

neck.title: Neck
neck.description: Exercises for gentle restoration of neck mobility and reducing discomfort.

armRaiseForward.title: Arm raise forward
armRaiseForward.description: Slowly raise your arm forward to a comfortable level.

elbowFlexion.title: Elbow flexion
elbowFlexion.description: Slowly bend your arm at the elbow.

seatedLegRaise.title: Seated leg raise
seatedLegRaise.description: While sitting upright, slowly raise your leg forward and then lower it back down.

kneeFlexion.title: Knee flexion
kneeFlexion.description: Slowly bend the leg at the knee within a comfortable range of motion.

shoulderBackwardMovement.title: Shoulder backward movement
shoulderBackwardMovement.description: Slowly move your shoulders backward, trying to open the chest.

gentleBackStretch.title: Gentle back stretch
gentleBackStretch.description: Perform a gentle back stretch without sudden bends.

sideNeckTilts.title: Side neck tilts
sideNeckTilts.description: Slowly tilt your head left and right without sudden movements.

headTurns.title: Head turns
headTurns.description: Gently turn your head to the sides within a comfortable range.

exercise.label: Exercise page
exercise.cameraPlaceholder: At the next stages, the user's camera and real-time AI movement analysis will be displayed here.
exercise.tipText: Perform the exercise slowly, without sudden movements, and stop if you feel strong pain.
exercise.statusReady: Status: exercise has not started yet
exercise.cameraOff: Камера вимкнена. Натисніть кнопку нижче, щоб почати.
exercise.cameraError: Не вдалося отримати доступ до камери.
exercise.cameraPermission: Дозвольте доступ до камери у браузері.
